title: Brownie Tin Baking Tray Non Stick| 30x23x5 cm, Cake Trays for Baking Tins Large Rectangle Swiss Roll Tin, Easy to Clean Heavy Duty Deep Pan with Cutting Guides Swift Release
features: Easy Release: Large rectangular brownie cake tins for baking won't chip off or get rust due to double layer Quantum II non stick certified coating, high gloss smooth surface. Quick and smooth release. Run a non-serrated knife or spatulas
Built to Last: Heavy duty Traybake Carbon Steel baking trays for oven non stick with 0.6 mm thickness saves from Dent or Warp, weight speaks itself. Oven safe heat resistant upto 260°C
Ergonomic Design: Unique large baking tray 30.5x22.8cm with 5 cm deep angled corners. Convenient handles for easy grip. Markings for accurate slicing. Rolled edges for strength and safety

Variety of Baking: Rholet rectangular cake tin ensures even heating, and are ideal for those who prefer soft and gooey brownies. Do not use it for stovetop cooking and roasting. The 5cm depth is right for baking flapjacks, focaccia, lasagne, swiss rolls, tarts, shortbread, cheesecake etc

Health is Wealth: Tray bake cake tin is PFOA, PTFE-Free. Easy to clean with hand wash, dry thoroughly. Every non-stick utensils are prone to dishwasher, freezers, bleaches, wire brushes, sharp tools, therefore, avoid using them on tin
